mapper.select: merge into transcription t using ( values (#{transcription.id}::bigint, #{transcription.songId}::bigint, #{transcription.pubId}::bigint, #{transcription.details}) ) as s(id, song_id, pub_id, details) on (t.id = s.id) or (t.song_id = s.song_id and t.pub_id = s.pub_id) when matched then update set song_id = s.song_id, pub_id = s.pub_id, details = merge_details(t.details, s.details) when not matched then insert (song_id, pub_id, details) values (s.song_id, s.pub_id, s.details) returning t.id, t.song_id, t.pub_id, t.details, merge_action() as action
select id, song_id, pub_id, details, null as action from transcription where id = #{id}
